Entry.JapaneseText: Ruca
Entry.EnglishText: Ruca

Entry.JapaneseText: 頑張ってついていくよ
Entry.EnglishText: I'll do my best to keep up.

Entry.JapaneseText: な、なんとかがんばろうね
Entry.EnglishText: I-I'll do everything I can. Somehow.

Entry.JapaneseText: 強引に行くの！？ ま、待ってよ！
Entry.EnglishText: W-We're going no matter what?! W-Wait up!

Entry.JapaneseText: 足は引っ張らないように気をつけるよ……
Entry.EnglishText: I'll be careful not to drag you down...

Entry.JapaneseText: 置いてかないでね。約束だよ
Entry.EnglishText: I won't leave you behind. I promise.

Entry.JapaneseText: 海から敵とか……現れないよね？
Entry.EnglishText: Enemies won't... pop out from the sea, right?

Entry.JapaneseText: い、行くしかないんだよね……
Entry.EnglishText: I-I've gotta do this...

Entry.JapaneseText: 二人でがんばろうね
Entry.EnglishText: Let's both do our best.

Entry.JapaneseText: すごいよ！ さすがだね！
Entry.EnglishText: Amazing! Just like I'd expect from you!

Entry.JapaneseText: 今の動き、とってもよかったよ
Entry.EnglishText: That move you did just now was incredible.

Entry.JapaneseText: 僕も負けないようにがんばらなきゃ
Entry.EnglishText: I have to do my best not to lose, too.

Entry.JapaneseText: どんどん倒しちゃうんだね
Entry.EnglishText: You really are defeating them so fast.

Entry.JapaneseText: 本当にすごいね！ 僕も見習わなきゃ！
Entry.EnglishText: That was really amazing! I'll have to learn from watching you!

Entry.JapaneseText: うわー、楽に勝つんだね
Entry.EnglishText: Whoaaa, that was an easy win, huh.

Entry.JapaneseText: あ、あんまり一人でがんばらないでね
Entry.EnglishText: Ah. You don't have to do so much all by yourself.

Entry.JapaneseText: 僕って、邪魔なだけなのかな？
Entry.EnglishText: I wonder if I'm just in the way...?

Entry.JapaneseText: やったね！
Entry.EnglishText: You did it!

Entry.JapaneseText: その調子だよ
Entry.EnglishText: Just like that.

Entry.JapaneseText: あの……少し手加減してあげた方が……
Entry.EnglishText: Um... we should go a bit easier on them...

Entry.JapaneseText: やりづらいよね。相手がこれじゃ
Entry.EnglishText: This enemy is tough, huh.

Entry.JapaneseText: 僕達に近寄らないで！
Entry.EnglishText: Don't get near us!

Entry.JapaneseText: あ、怪我……大丈夫ですか？
Entry.EnglishText: Ah, you're hurt... Are you alright?

Entry.JapaneseText: さすが、僕なんかとはちがうね！
Entry.EnglishText: Just like I thought, you're way better than me!

Entry.JapaneseText: そんな数、僕にはとても無理だよ……
Entry.EnglishText: This many of them is way out of my league...

Entry.JapaneseText: 一人でそんなに倒すなんて、すごすぎるよ！
Entry.EnglishText: Defeating so many of them all by yourself is so incredible!

Entry.JapaneseText: もうそんなに！？ すごすぎてもう……
Entry.EnglishText: So many already?! You're so incredible...

Entry.JapaneseText: 仲間が一騎当千なんて、なんだか僕まで誇らしいよ
Entry.EnglishText: My companion being such a mighty warrior makes me kinda proud, too.

Entry.JapaneseText: 今日はとっても技のキレがいいね
Entry.EnglishText: Your technique is so nice and clean today, huh.

Entry.JapaneseText: すごい！ まだ止まらないんだ
Entry.EnglishText: Amazing! And you're still going!

Entry.JapaneseText: 僕じゃとてもついていけないよ……
Entry.EnglishText: There's no way I could keep up with what you do...

Entry.JapaneseText: 僕、足手まといにしかならないんじゃ……
Entry.EnglishText: The only thing I'll end up doing here is being a burden on you...

Entry.JapaneseText: こんなすごい戦い方があるなんて……
Entry.EnglishText: I had no idea there was such an incredible way to fight...

Entry.JapaneseText: 一人で戦局を変える程の強さ……
Entry.EnglishText: To think you have the strength to change the tide of a battle all by yourself...

Entry.JapaneseText: 気にしないで。僕もたいした事ないから
Entry.EnglishText: Don't worry about it. I'm nothing impressive myself.

Entry.JapaneseText: きっと、もっとやれるよ
Entry.EnglishText: I just know you can do even more than this.

Entry.JapaneseText: うん！ 調子出てきたみたいだね
Entry.EnglishText: Yeah! It looks like you're getting the hang of this.

Entry.JapaneseText: 安心して一緒に戦えるよ
Entry.EnglishText: I can fight with confidence with you at my side.

Entry.JapaneseText: 僕なんかじゃ、邪魔になるんじゃ……
Entry.EnglishText: Someone like me will just get in your way...

Entry.JapaneseText: 一緒に戦えば、僕も強くなれるかもしれない
Entry.EnglishText: If we fight together, even I might get stronger, too.

Entry.JapaneseText: 体力に気をつけてね
Entry.EnglishText: Keep an eye on your wellbeing.

Entry.JapaneseText: 体力が減ってるよ！ 回復しなきゃ！
Entry.EnglishText: You're taking a lot of damage! You need to rest!

Entry.JapaneseText: ま、まずいよ！ いったん逃げた方が！
Entry.EnglishText: N-Not good! We should run away for now!

Entry.JapaneseText: 行くん……だよね？
Entry.EnglishText: We're... going, huh?

Entry.JapaneseText: また敵が！？
Entry.EnglishText: Another enemy?!

Entry.JapaneseText: 大丈夫！？ 怪我、見せてみて！
Entry.EnglishText: Are you okay?! Let me see your wounds!

Entry.JapaneseText: 僕が……僕ががんばらないと……！
Entry.EnglishText: I... I have to do my best...!

Entry.JapaneseText: やっぱり僕じゃ……ダメなの？
Entry.EnglishText: Just like I figured, I'm... no good, huh?

Entry.JapaneseText: ま、待ってよ！ 置いてかないで！
Entry.EnglishText: W-Wait! Don't leave me behind!
